modules.module_title: Introduction to Knitting & Crochet, Tools & Materials

questions.question: Knitting aur Crochet mein fundamental difference kya hai?

options.A: Knitting mein ek needle use hoti hai, crochet mein do.
options.B: Knitting mein do needles use hoti hain, crochet mein ek hook.
options.C: Knitting mein hook use hota hai, crochet mein needles.
options.D: Dono mein same tools use hote hain.

questions.explanation: Knitting mein aam taur par do needles ka istemal hota hai, jabki crochet mein ek single hook use hota hai.

questions.question: Ek beginner ke liye kaun sa yarn type sabse accha rehta hai practice karne ke liye?

options.B: Bulky weight chenille

questions.explanation: Worsted weight acrylic yarn easy to handle hota hai, stitches clear dikhte hain, aur affordable bhi hota hai beginners ke liye.

questions.question: Stitch markers ka kya use hota hai Knitting aur Crochet mein?

options.A: Yarn ko cut karne ke liye
options.B: Stitches ko count karne aur specific jagah mark karne ke liye
options.C: Needles ko clean karne ke liye
options.D: Finished product ko decorate karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Stitch markers ka use stitches ko count karne, pattern repeats ko mark karne, aur specific points ko yaad rakhne ke liye hota hai.

questions.question: Measuring tape kis liye essential tool hai?

options.A: Yarn ki quality check karne ke liye
options.B: Project ke dimensions aur gauge ko measure karne ke liye
options.C: Needle size determine karne ke liye
options.D: Stitch definition enhance karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Measuring tape project ke dimensions jaise length, width, aur gauge ko sahi se measure karne ke liye bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: Darning needle (tapestry needle) ka primary use kya hai?

options.B: Yarn ends ko weave in karne aur seams join karne ke liye
options.C: Yarn balls ko organize karne ke liye
options.D: Pattern ko read karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Darning needle blunt-tipped hoti hai aur uska use yarn ends ko project mein hide karne (weave in) aur project ke pieces ko join karne (seaming) ke liye hota hai.

questions.question: Agar aapko ek bade blanket ke liye yarn select karna hai, toh aap kaun sa yarn weight prefer karenge jo jaldi complete ho sake?

options.B: Fingering

questions.explanation: Bulky weight yarn thick hota hai aur isse bade projects jaldi ban jaate hain, jo blanket jaise items ke liye ideal hai.

questions.question: Circular knitting needles ka kya fayda hai over straight needles?

options.A: Ye sirf crochet ke liye use hoti hain.
options.B: Ye bade projects jaise blankets aur garments ko seamlessly knit karne mein help karti hain.
options.C: Ye sirf small projects ke liye useful hain.
options.D: Inka use sirf colorwork ke liye hota hai.

questions.explanation: Circular needles ka use bade projects (jaise sweaters, blankets) ko ek saath, bina seam ke knit karne ke liye hota hai, aur ye straight needles se zyada stitches hold kar sakti hain.

questions.question: Yarn winder ka kya purpose hai?

options.A: Yarn ko dry karne ke liye
options.B: Yarn ko skein se center-pull ball mein convert karne ke liye
options.C: Yarn ko dye karne ke liye
options.D: Yarn ko measure karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Yarn winder ka use skeins (twisted bundles) se yarn ko neat, center-pull balls mein convert karne ke liye hota hai, jo knitting ya crochet ke dauran tangle hone se bachate hain.

questions.question: Ek ergonomic crochet hook ka kya benefit hai?

options.A: Ye stitches ko tight banata hai.
options.B: Ye hand aur wrist strain ko reduce karta hai long working sessions mein.
options.C: Ye yarn ko zyada slippery banata hai.
options.D: Ye project ko jaldi complete karta hai.

questions.explanation: Ergonomic hooks ko aise design kiya jata hai jo haath aur kalai par stress ko kam karte hain, jisse lambe samay tak kaam karna comfortable hota hai.

questions.question: Agar aap knitting karte samay apni needles ko ek jagah se dusri jagah le ja rahe hain, toh stitches ko fall off hone se bachane ke liye aap kya use karenge?

options.B: Needle caps/point protectors

questions.explanation: Needle caps ya point protectors needles ke tips par lagaye jaate hain taaki stitches needles se slip na ho jab project ko transport kiya ja raha ho ya break liya gaya ho.

questions.question: Yarn labels par 'Dye Lot' number ka kya importance hai?

options.A: Ye yarn ki thickness batata hai.
options.B: Ye yarn ke color consistency ko ensure karta hai.
options.C: Ye yarn ki fiber content batata hai.
options.D: Ye yarn ki washing instructions batata hai.

questions.explanation: Dye lot number indicate karta hai ki yarn ke us batch ko ek hi dye bath mein color kiya gaya hai. Different dye lots mein slight color variations ho sakte hain, isliye ek project ke liye same dye lot ka yarn use karna chahiye.

questions.question: Kaun sa tool 'cable knitting' ke liye specifically use hota hai?

options.B: Darning needle

questions.explanation: Cable needle ek short, U-shaped ya bent needle hoti hai jo stitches ko temporarily hold karti hai jab cable pattern banaya jata hai.

questions.question: Ek stitch holder ka kya kaam hai?

options.B: Stitches ko temporarily hold karna jo baad mein use honge

questions.explanation: Stitch holder stitches ko temporarily hold karta hai jab un par kaam nahi ho raha hota, jaise armholes ya necklines ke stitches.

questions.question: Yarn Swift ka kya purpose hai?

options.A: Yarn ko dry karne ke liye
options.B: Hanks se yarn ko unwind karne mein help karna
options.C: Yarn ko different colors mein dye karna

questions.explanation: Yarn Swift hanks (large loops of yarn) ko hold karta hai aur unhe smoothly unwind karne mein help karta hai jab yarn ko balls mein wind kiya ja raha ho, tangles se bachate hue.

questions.question: Aapko ek baby blanket banana hai. Kaun sa fiber type sabse safe aur soft rahega baby ki skin ke liye?

options.B: Silk blend

questions.explanation: Soft acrylic ya cotton yarns babies ki delicate skin ke liye non-allergenic aur gentle hote hain, aur inko wash karna bhi easy hota hai.

questions.question: Knitting aur Crochet ke liye comfortable working position maintain karna kyun important hai?

options.B: Isse posture related issues aur muscle strain se bacha ja sakta hai.
options.C: Isse yarn zyada smooth ho jata hai.

questions.explanation: Sahi posture aur comfortable position se back pain, neck pain aur wrist strain jaise issues se bacha ja sakta hai, khaaskar jab lambe samay tak kaam karna ho.

questions.question: Tension ring (ya yarn guide) ka kya fayda hai?

options.A: Ye stitches ko loose karta hai.
options.B: Ye yarn ko evenly flow karne mein help karta hai aur consistent tension maintain karta hai.
options.C: Ye yarn ko cut karne ke liye use hota hai.
options.D: Ye project ko block karne ke liye use hota hai.

questions.explanation: Tension ring fingers ke around yarn ko guide karta hai, jisse yarn ka flow smooth rehta hai aur uniform stitch tension maintain karne mein help milti hai, khaaskar jab multiple colors use ho rahe hon.

questions.question: Knitting mein 'Cast On' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Needle par pehle stitches banana

questions.explanation: Cast on technique ka use karke knitting project ke liye starting stitches ko needle par banaya jata hai.

questions.question: Garter stitch banane ke liye kaun sa stitch repeat kiya jata hai?

options.B: Sirf Knit stitches

questions.explanation: Garter stitch mein har row mein sirf knit stitches banaye jaate hain, jisse ek reversible, bumpy fabric banta hai.

questions.question: Stockinette stitch (Stocking stitch) banane ke liye kya kiya jata hai?

options.B: Har row mein purl stitches
options.C: Alternate rows of knit and purl stitches

questions.explanation: Stockinette stitch mein ek row knit aur agla row purl kiya jata hai, jisse ek side smooth (V-shapes) aur dusri side bumpy (horizontal bars) hoti hai.

questions.question: Knitting mein 'Bind Off' ya 'Cast Off' ka kya use hai?

options.B: Project ko finish karna aur stitches ko secure karna

questions.explanation: Bind off technique ka use karke project ke end mein stitches ko secure kiya jata hai taaki wo unravel na ho.

questions.question: K2tog (Knit two together) ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Do knit stitches ek saath banana
options.B: Do stitches ko knit karke unhe ek stitch mein reduce karna
options.C: Ek stitch ko do mein increase karna
options.D: Do yarn colors ko join karna

questions.explanation: K2tog ek basic decrease technique hai jismein do stitches ko ek saath knit karke unhe ek stitch mein reduce kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Ribbing (jaise 1x1 Rib) banane ka kya purpose hota hai garments mein?

options.B: Fabric ko stretchable aur form-fitting banana

questions.explanation: Ribbing (knit aur purl stitches ko alternate karke) fabric ko stretchable banata hai aur use garments ke edges (jaise cuffs, hemlines) par form-fitting fit dene ke liye use kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Slipping a stitch (sl1) ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Ek stitch ko right needle par bina knit ya purl kiye transfer karna

questions.explanation: Slipping a stitch mein ek stitch ko right needle par bina work kiye transfer kiya jata hai, jiska use edges banane ya specific patterns mein hota hai.

questions.question: Agar aapko ek project mein ek stitch increase karna hai, toh common method kya hai?

options.B: Bind Off

questions.explanation: KFB (Knit Front and Back) ek common increase method hai jismein ek hi stitch mein do stitches banaye jaate hain.

questions.question: SSK (Slip, Slip, Knit) ek decrease technique hai. Ye K2tog se kaise different hai?

options.A: SSK left-leaning decrease banata hai, K2tog right-leaning.
options.B: SSK right-leaning decrease banata hai, K2tog left-leaning.
options.C: Dono same direction mein decrease karte hain.
options.D: SSK increase karta hai, K2tog decrease.

questions.explanation: SSK (Slip, Slip, Knit) ek left-leaning decrease banata hai, jabki K2tog (Knit two together) ek right-leaning decrease banata hai. Ye shaping aur symmetry ke liye important hota hai.

questions.question: Yarn Over (YO) ka primary use kya hai Knitting mein?

options.B: Ek hole (lace) banana aur ek stitch increase karna

questions.explanation: Yarn Over (YO) ek naya stitch create karta hai aur saath hi ek chhota hole bhi banata hai, jiska use lace patterns mein hota hai.

questions.question: Agar aap circular needles par ek hat knit kar rahe hain, toh aap 'in the round' kaise knit karenge?

options.A: Har row mein alag-alag stitches use karke
options.B: Har row ko join karke ek continuous tube banana
options.C: Project ko flat banakar baad mein seam karna

questions.explanation: Knitting 'in the round' mein stitches ko circular needle par join kiya jata hai aur continuous loops mein knit kiya jata hai, jisse ek seamless tube banta hai jaise hats, socks, ya sweater bodies.

questions.question: Backwards Loop Cast-On method kahan use kiya jata hai?

options.B: Temporary stitches add karne ke liye (jaise buttonholes)
options.C: Finishing ke baad edges ko secure karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Backwards Loop Cast-On ek loose aur stretchy cast-on hai, jo aam taur par project ke beech mein temporarily stitches add karne ke liye use hota hai, jaise buttonholes ya armhole shaping.

questions.question: Long-Tail Cast-On method ka kya fayda hai?

options.A: Ye bahut tight edge banata hai.
options.B: Ye ek stretchy aur sturdy edge provide karta hai, jo garments ke liye ideal hai.
options.C: Ye sirf decorative purpose ke liye hai.
options.D: Ye sabse mushkil cast-on method hai.

questions.explanation: Long-Tail Cast-On ek popular aur versatile method hai jo ek stretchy, neat aur sturdy edge deta hai, jo zyada tar projects ke liye suitable hai.

questions.question: Knitting mein 'gauge' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Stitches aur rows ki density per inch/cm

questions.explanation: Gauge stitches aur rows ki density hoti hai jo ek specific area (jaise 4x4 inch) mein banti hai. Ye project ke final size ko determine karta hai.

questions.question: Knit stitch mein 'V' shape kahan banta hai?

options.B: Knit side par

questions.explanation: Knit stitch ke front side par V-shaped loops dikhte hain, jo Stockinette stitch ke smooth side ka hissa hote hain.

questions.question: Agar aapko ek project ke edges ko zyada neat aur less curly banana hai, toh aap kya use kar sakte hain?

options.B: Stockinette stitch border

questions.explanation: Garter stitch naturally flat rehta hai aur curling ko prevent karta hai, isliye ye borders ke liye ek accha option hai.

questions.question: Purl stitch mein 'bump' kahan banta hai?

options.B: Purl side par

questions.explanation: Purl stitch ke front side par horizontal bumps ya 'bars' dikhte hain, jo Stockinette stitch ke bumpy side ka hissa hote hain.

questions.question: Crochet mein 'Slip Knot' banana kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Ye project ko finish karta hai.
options.B: Ye hook par pehla loop banata hai.
options.C: Ye yarn ko cut karta hai.

questions.explanation: Slip knot crochet hook par pehla adjustable loop banata hai, jisse aage chain stitches banaye jaate hain.

questions.question: Chain stitch (ch) ka kya role hai Crochet mein?

options.A: Ye project ko finish karta hai.
options.B: Ye zyada tar crochet projects ki foundation banata hai.
options.C: Ye sirf decorative purpose ke liye hai.
options.D: Ye stitches ko decrease karta hai.

questions.explanation: Chain stitch crochet ki sabse basic foundation stitch hai, jisse zyada tar projects shuru hote hain.

questions.question: Single Crochet (sc) stitch ki height kitni hoti hai compared to Double Crochet (dc)?

options.A: Sc, dc se lamba hota hai.
options.B: Sc, dc se chhota hota hai.
options.C: Dono ki height same hoti hai.
options.D: Height yarn type par depend karti hai, stitch type par nahi.

questions.explanation: Single Crochet (sc) ek short stitch hai, jabki Double Crochet (dc) usse lamba hota hai, jisse fabric ki height increase hoti hai.

questions.question: Half Double Crochet (hdc) stitch ki kya speciality hai?

options.B: Ye sc aur dc ke beech ki height ka stitch hai aur thoda denser hota hai.
options.C: Ye sirf lace patterns ke liye use hota hai.
options.D: Ye project ko finish karne ke liye use hota hai.

questions.explanation: Half Double Crochet (hdc) single crochet aur double crochet ke beech ki height ka hota hai, aur ye ek slightly denser fabric banata hai.

questions.question: Crochet mein 'Slip Stitch' (sl st) ka kya primary use hai?

options.B: Stitches ko join karna ya ek invisible seam banana

questions.explanation: Slip stitch ka use round mein work ko join karne, stitches ko move karne bina height add kiye, ya ek invisible seam banane ke liye hota hai.

questions.question: Magic Ring (ya Magic Circle) ka kya fayda hai amigurumi (stuffed toys) mein?

options.A: Ye project ko loose banata hai.
options.B: Ye ek tight, gap-free center hole provide karta hai.
options.C: Ye stitches ko increase karta hai.
options.D: Ye yarn ko zyada shiny banata hai.

questions.explanation: Magic Ring ek adjustable loop hota hai jo amigurumi jaise projects ke liye ek tight aur gap-free center hole banata hai, jisse stuffing bahar nahi aati.

questions.question: Crochet mein 'Turning Chain' kyun banaya jata hai?

options.A: Row ke end mein decoration ke liye
options.B: Next row ki height tak pahunchne ke liye
options.C: Stitches ko loose karne ke liye
options.D: Yarn ko secure karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Turning chain next row ki height tak pahunchne aur fabric ko straight rakhne ke liye banaya jata hai. Har stitch type ke liye turning chain ki height alag hoti hai (e.g., 1 ch for sc, 2 ch for hdc, 3 ch for dc).

questions.question: Yarn Over (YO) ka kya matlab hai Crochet mein?

options.A: Yarn ko hook ke upar se wrap karna
options.B: Yarn ko cut karna

questions.explanation: Yarn Over (YO) ka matlab hai yarn ko hook ke upar se wrap karna, jo ki zyada tar crochet stitches ka pehla step hota hai.

questions.question: Crochet mein 'decrease' karne ke liye sabse common method kya hai?

options.B: Chain (ch)

questions.explanation: Single Crochet Two Together (sc2tog) do single crochet stitches ko ek stitch mein combine karke ek decrease banata hai.

questions.question: Agar aapko ek flat circular piece banana hai (jaise coaster), toh aap kaise shuru karenge?

options.B: Magic Ring se ya chain 3/4 join karke ring banana

questions.explanation: Circular projects ko shuru karne ke liye Magic Ring ya ek chhota chain (3-4 stitches) banakar use slip stitch se join karke ring banaya jata hai.

questions.question: Crochet mein 'Front Loop Only' (FLO) aur 'Back Loop Only' (BLO) mein work karne ka kya impact hota hai fabric par?

options.A: Isse fabric ka color change hota hai.
options.B: Isse fabric mein ribbing ya texture banta hai.
options.C: Isse fabric zyada loose ho jata hai.
options.D: Isse stitches disappear ho jaate hain.

questions.explanation: FLO aur BLO mein work karne se fabric mein alag-alag textures bante hain. BLO ribbing effect deta hai, jabki FLO ek ridge banata hai, jo shaping aur design mein use hota hai.

questions.question: Crochet mein 'Fasten Off' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Yarn ko cut karna aur last loop ko secure karna

questions.explanation: Fasten off ka matlab hai project ke end mein yarn ko cut karna aur usse last loop se pull karke secure karna taaki project unravel na ho.

questions.question: Crochet Hook size aur yarn thickness mein kya relation hai?

options.A: Thicker yarn ke liye chhota hook.
options.B: Thicker yarn ke liye bada hook.
options.D: Hook size sirf color par depend karta hai.

questions.explanation: Thicker yarn ke liye generally bade hook size ki zaroorat hoti hai taaki stitches appropriate size ke bane aur fabric stiff na ho.

questions.question: Treble Crochet (tr) stitch ki height Double Crochet (dc) se kaise compare hoti hai?

options.A: Tr, dc se chhota hota hai.
options.B: Tr, dc se lamba hota hai.
options.C: Dono ki height same hoti hai.
options.D: Tr sirf round projects ke liye use hota hai.

questions.explanation: Treble Crochet (tr) Double Crochet (dc) se lamba stitch hota hai, kyuki ismein hook par do baar yarn over kiya jata hai shuruat mein.

questions.question: Crochet mein 'cluster stitch' banane ka kya maqsad hai?

options.B: Fabric mein texture aur bulk add karna

questions.explanation: Cluster stitch mein kai incomplete stitches ko ek saath join kiya jata hai, jisse ek 'puff' ya 'bobble' jaisa texture aur bulk banta hai.

questions.question: Agar aapko ek project mein ek stitch increase karna hai, toh common method kya hai Crochet mein?

options.B: Work 2 stitches into the same stitch

questions.explanation: Ek hi stitch mein do ya usse zyada stitches work karne se stitches increase hote hain, jo shaping ke liye use hota hai.

questions.question: Crochet mein 'picot' stitch ka kya use hai?

options.B: Decorative edging banana

questions.explanation: Picot stitch ek chhota, decorative loop hota hai jo aam taur par edges aur borders par use hota hai, jisse ek frilly ya pointed effect milta hai.

questions.question: Knitting pattern mein 'RS' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Reverse Stitch

questions.explanation: RS ka matlab Right Side hota hai, jo project ka visible ya 'public' side hota hai.

questions.question: Crochet pattern mein 'ch' ka kya abbreviation hai?

options.B: Chain

questions.explanation: ch ka matlab Chain stitch hota hai, jo crochet ki foundation stitch hai.

questions.question: Gauge swatch banana kyun zaroori hai koi bhi project shuru karne se pehle?

options.A: Ye sirf yarn ki quality check karta hai.
options.B: Ye ensure karta hai ki project pattern ke specified size ka bane.
options.C: Ye yarn ko zyada soft banata hai.
options.D: Ye project ko jaldi complete karta hai.

questions.explanation: Gauge swatch banakar hum apni knitting/crochet tension ko pattern ke specified gauge se match karte hain, jisse project ka final size sahi rehta hai.

questions.question: Agar aapka gauge swatch 'too many stitches per inch' show kar raha hai pattern ke comparison mein, toh aapko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Chhota hook/needle size lena chahiye.
options.C: Yarn ka color change karna chahiye.
options.D: Apni tension ko tight karna chahiye.

questions.explanation: Agar aapke stitches bahut dense hain (too many stitches per inch), toh aapko bada hook/needle use karna chahiye taaki stitches loose ho aur gauge match kare.

questions.question: Knitting pattern mein parentheses '()' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Ye instructions hain jo ek hi baar repeat honge.
options.B: Ye instructions hain jo multiple sizes ke liye hain, aapko apne size ke hisaab se follow karna hai.

questions.explanation: Patterns mein parentheses '()' ya brackets '[]' ka use multiple sizes ke liye instructions dene ke liye hota hai. Aapko apne project ke size ke corresponding number ko follow karna hota hai.

questions.question: Crochet pattern mein 'rep' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Repeat

questions.explanation: rep ka matlab Repeat hota hai, jiska matlab hai ki aapko us section ki instructions ko dobara follow karna hai.

questions.question: Knitting pattern mein 'WS' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: With Stitches

questions.explanation: WS ka matlab Wrong Side hota hai, jo project ka ulta ya 'back' side hota hai.

questions.question: Agar aapka gauge swatch 'too few stitches per inch' show kar raha hai, toh aapko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Chhota hook/needle size lena chahiye.
options.C: Yarn ka fiber change karna chahiye.
options.D: Apni tension ko loose karna chahiye.

questions.explanation: Agar aapke stitches bahut loose hain (too few stitches per inch), toh aapko chhota hook/needle use karna chahiye taaki stitches tight ho aur gauge match kare.

questions.question: Crochet pattern mein 'sk' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Slip Knit

questions.explanation: sk ka matlab Skip hota hai, jiska matlab hai ki aapko us stitch ko work kiye bina agle stitch par jaana hai.

questions.question: Knitting ya Crochet pattern mein 'asterisk (*)' aur square brackets '[]' ka kya role hai?

options.B: Ye instructions hain jo repeat honge.
options.D: Ye yarn ke type batate hain.

questions.explanation: Asterisk (*) aur square brackets '[]' ka use pattern mein ek section ko mark karne ke liye hota hai jise repeat karna hota hai.

questions.question: Pattern mein 'pm' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Place Marker

questions.explanation: pm ka matlab Place Marker hota hai, jiska matlab hai ki aapko us point par ek stitch marker lagana hai.

questions.question: Knitting pattern mein 'patt' ka kya abbreviation hai?

options.B: Pattern

questions.explanation: patt ka matlab Pattern hota hai, jiska matlab hai ki aapko established pattern ko continue karna hai.

questions.question: Crochet pattern mein 'FO' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Fasten Off

questions.explanation: FO ka matlab Fasten Off hota hai, jiska matlab hai project ko finish karke yarn ko secure karna.

questions.question: Why is it important to block a gauge swatch?

options.A: Isse yarn ka color change hota hai.
options.B: Isse aapko final product ka accurate gauge milta hai, khaaskar fiber jo blocking se change hote hain.
options.C: Isse stitches tight ho jaate hain.
options.D: Isse yarn zyada shiny ho jata hai.

questions.explanation: Kuch fibers (jaise wool) blocking ke baad stretch ya settle hote hain. Gauge swatch ko block karne se aapko project ka sabse accurate final size milta hai.

questions.question: Pattern mein 'dec' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Decrease

questions.explanation: dec ka matlab Decrease hota hai, jiska matlab hai stitches ko reduce karna.

questions.question: Pattern mein 'inc' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Include

questions.explanation: inc ka matlab Increase hota hai, jiska matlab hai stitches ko add karna.

questions.question: Pattern mein 'rem' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Remain

questions.explanation: rem ka matlab Remain hota hai, jiska matlab hai ki kitne stitches bache hain ya kitne stitches par kaam karna hai.

questions.question: Finishing technique 'Weaving in ends' kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Ye project ko zyada loose banata hai.
options.B: Ye project ko neat aur professional dikhata hai aur unraveling se bachata hai.
options.C: Ye sirf decorative purpose ke liye hai.
options.D: Ye project ko jaldi finish karta hai.

questions.explanation: Yarn ke loose ends ko project mein weave in karne se project neat aur polished dikhta hai, aur stitches ko secure karta hai taaki wo khul na jaayen.

questions.question: Knitting mein 'Mattress Stitch' ka kya use hai?

options.B: Seamlessly do knitted pieces ko join karna

questions.explanation: Mattress Stitch ek invisible seaming technique hai jo do knitted fabric pieces ko ek saath join karti hai, jisse ek smooth, undetectable seam banta hai.

questions.question: Blocking ka kya fayda hai finished knitted/crocheted items par?

options.A: Ye project ko shrink karta hai.
options.B: Ye stitches ko evenly set karta hai, fabric ko shape deta hai aur drape ko improve karta hai.
options.C: Ye yarn ko rough banata hai.
options.D: Ye project ko waterproof banata hai.

questions.explanation: Blocking ek finishing process hai jismein project ko wet karke ya steam karke shape diya jata hai, jisse stitches evenly set hote hain, fabric ka drape improve hota hai aur final dimensions sahi hote hain.

questions.question: Wet blocking method mein kya kiya jata hai?

options.A: Project ko sirf steam kiya jata hai.
options.B: Project ko poora pani mein soak karke pin kiya jata hai.
options.C: Project ko dry clean kiya jata hai.
options.D: Project ko sirf iron kiya jata hai.

questions.explanation: Wet blocking mein project ko poora pani mein soak kiya jata hai, extra pani gently nikal kar use blocking mats par pin karke dry hone diya jata hai.

questions.question: Agar aapko ek sweater ke armholes aur neckline ko shape karna hai, toh aap kaun si basic techniques use karenge?

options.B: Increases aur decreases

questions.explanation: Armholes aur necklines ko shape dene ke liye stitches ko badhaya (increase) ya ghataya (decrease) jata hai, jisse curve aur fit banta hai.

questions.question: Crochet mein 'Invisible Join' ka kya use hai round projects mein?

options.A: Ye sirf color change ke liye hai.
options.B: Ye round ke end ko seamlessly join karta hai, jisse koi bump nahi dikhta.
options.C: Ye stitches ko loose karta hai.
options.D: Ye project ko waterproof banata hai.

questions.explanation: Invisible Join ek finishing technique hai jo round projects mein use hoti hai, jisse round ke end ko aise join kiya jata hai ki koi visible seam ya bump na dikhe.

questions.question: Project planning mein 'Yarn requirements' calculate karna kyun essential hai?

options.A: Isse project ka color decide hota hai.
options.B: Isse ensure hota hai ki aapke paas project complete karne ke liye sufficient yarn hai.
options.C: Isse project ka difficulty level pata chalta hai.
options.D: Isse yarn zyada soft hota hai.

questions.explanation: Sahi yarn requirements calculate karne se aapko pata chalta hai ki project ke liye kitna yarn chahiye, jisse aapko beech mein yarn khatam hone ki problem nahi aati.

questions.question: Seaming karte samay 'wrong sides together' se kya banta hai?

options.B: Ek prominent seam jo right side par dikhta hai

questions.explanation: Wrong sides together seaming karne se seam right side par visible hota hai, jise ek design element ke taur par bhi use kiya ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Steam blocking method ka kya fayda hai over wet blocking?

options.B: Ye delicate fibers ke liye safe hota hai aur drying time kam hota hai.
options.C: Ye sirf acrylic yarn ke liye hai.
options.D: Ye fabric ko shrink karta hai.

questions.explanation: Steam blocking mein project ko steam kiya jata hai (bina direct heat contact ke). Ye delicate fibers ke liye safe hota hai, aur drying time wet blocking se kam hota hai.

questions.question: Buttonholes banane ke liye kaun si technique use ki jaati hai knitting mein?

options.B: Binding off stitches in the middle of a row and casting on new ones in the next row

questions.explanation: Buttonholes banane ke liye, ek row mein kuch stitches ko bind off kiya jata hai aur agle row mein unki jagah naye stitches cast on kiye jaate hain, jisse ek hole banta hai.

questions.question: Crochet mein 'crab stitch' (reverse single crochet) ka kya use hai?

options.B: Ek sturdy aur decorative edge banana

questions.explanation: Crab stitch ek reverse single crochet hai jo left se right work kiya jata hai. Ye ek rope-like, sturdy aur decorative edge banata hai jo curling ko prevent karta hai.

questions.question: Project ke liye 'swatch' banane ke alawa, 'pattern reading' mein kaun si cheez sabse important hai?

options.B: Abbreviations aur symbols ko samajhna

questions.explanation: Pattern reading mein abbreviations aur symbols ko sahi se samajhna bahut zaroori hai, taaki instructions ko accurately follow kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Agar aapko ek garment ke neckline ko 'pick up stitches' karke finish karna hai, toh aap kis tool ka use karenge?

options.B: Crochet hook ya knitting needle

questions.explanation: Neckline ya armhole ke edges se stitches ko pick up karne ke liye ek crochet hook ya knitting needle ka use kiya jata hai, jisse ek neat border ya collar banaya ja sake.

questions.question: Project planning mein apne 'target audience' ko consider karna kyun important hai?

options.A: Isse yarn ka color decide hota hai.
options.B: Isse design, size aur yarn selection (e.g., baby ke liye soft, washable yarn) mein help milti hai.
options.D: Isse sirf price decide hota hai.

questions.explanation: Target audience (jaise baby, adult, pet) ko consider karne se aap sahi design, size aur yarn type choose kar sakte hain, jo unki zarooraton aur preferences ke anusaar ho.

questions.question: Blocking ke liye 'blocking wires' ka kya fayda hai?

options.A: Ye project ko shrink karte hain.
options.B: Ye straight edges aur sharp corners maintain karne mein help karte hain.
options.C: Ye sirf circular projects ke liye hain.
options.D: Ye yarn ko dry karte hain.

questions.explanation: Blocking wires project ke edges mein insert kiye jaate hain aur unhe pins se secure kiya jata hai. Ye straight edges aur sharp corners achieve karne mein help karte hain, khaaskar lace projects mein.

questions.question: Knitting mein 'Kitchener Stitch' ka kya use hai?

options.B: Do sets of live stitches ko seamlessly join karna

questions.explanation: Kitchener Stitch ek method hai do sets of live stitches ko seamlessly join karne ka, jisse ek invisible seam banta hai. Ye aam taur par socks ke toes ya hat ke tops par use hota hai.

questions.question: Wool yarn ka ek primary advantage kya hai?

options.B: Ye bahut breathable, warm aur elastic hota hai.

questions.explanation: Wool apni warmth, breathability, aur elasticity ke liye jaana jata hai, aur ye moisture-wicking bhi hota hai.

questions.question: Acrylic yarn ka kya fayda hai, khaaskar beginners ke liye?

options.B: Ye hypoallergenic, durable aur easy to care (machine washable) hota hai.
options.D: Ye sirf winter wear ke liye use hota hai.

questions.explanation: Acrylic yarn synthetic hota hai, hypoallergenic, durable, aur machine washable hota hai, jo ise beginners aur everyday items ke liye popular choice banata hai.

questions.question: Yarn label par 'Superwash' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Yarn ko sirf dry clean karna chahiye.
options.B: Yarn ko machine wash kiya ja sakta hai bina shrink ya felt hue.

questions.explanation: Superwash treatment wale yarns ko machine wash kiya ja sakta hai bina felt hone ya shrink hone ke, jo unhe easy-care garments ke liye ideal banata hai.

questions.question: Cotton yarn ka ek disadvantage kya ho sakta hai as compared to wool?

options.B: Ye stretchable kam hota hai aur dry hone mein zyada time leta hai.

questions.explanation: Cotton yarn wool ki tarah elastic nahi hota aur pani absorb karne ke karan dry hone mein zyada time le sakta hai.

questions.question: Agar aap knitting karte samay ek stitch drop kar dete hain, toh aap use kaise fix kar sakte hain?

options.B: Crochet hook ka use karke us stitch ko ladder up karna.

questions.explanation: Ek chhota crochet hook ya ek spare knitting needle ka use karke dropped stitch ko uthaya ja sakta hai aur use sahi tarike se ladder up karke fix kiya ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Yarn 'ply' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Kitne strands ko twist karke yarn banaya gaya hai

questions.explanation: Yarn ply ka matlab hai ki kitne individual strands (plies) ko ek saath twist karke ek single yarn thread banaya gaya hai. Ye yarn ki strength aur durability ko affect karta hai.

questions.question: Finished knitted/crocheted items ko store karte samay 'mothballs' ka use kyun kiya jata hai?

options.A: Ye items ko soft banate hain.
options.B: Ye moths aur other pests se natural fibers ko protect karte hain.
options.C: Ye items ko fresh smell dete hain.
options.D: Ye items ko shrink hone se bachate hain.

questions.explanation: Mothballs ka use natural fibers (jaise wool, silk) ko moths, carpet beetles aur dusre pests se bachane ke liye hota hai jo in fibers ko damage kar sakte hain.

questions.question: Agar aapka yarn 'splitting' kar raha hai jab aap work kar rahe hain, toh kya ho sakta hai reason?

options.B: Yarn ki quality ya twist acchi nahi hai, ya aapka hook/needle tip bahut sharp hai.

questions.explanation: Yarn splitting (jab hook/needle yarn ke individual plies ko divide kar deta hai) poor quality yarn, loose twist, ya bahut sharp hook/needle tip ke karan ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Linen yarn ka primary characteristic kya hai?

options.A: Ye bahut stretchy aur warm hota hai.
options.B: Ye strong, durable hota hai aur summer wear ke liye breathable hota hai.
options.C: Ye bahut soft aur fluffy hota hai.

questions.explanation: Linen ek strong, durable natural fiber hai jo apni breathability aur cool feel ke liye jaana jata hai, isliye ye summer garments ke liye ideal hai.

questions.question: Agar aapko ek project mein 'twisted stitches' dikh rahe hain, toh kya possible reason ho sakta hai?

options.A: Yarn ka color change kiya hai.
options.B: Stitches ko galat tarike se knit ya purl kiya gaya hai (e.g., through the back loop instead of front).

questions.explanation: Twisted stitches tab bante hain jab stitches ko galat tarike se work kiya jata hai, jaise front loop ki jagah back loop mein ya ulte direction mein.

questions.question: Silk yarn ka ek khas feature kya hai?

options.B: Ye luxurious sheen, drape aur strength provide karta hai.
options.D: Ye summer mein garmi deta hai.

questions.explanation: Silk yarn apni natural sheen, smooth texture, excellent drape aur strength ke liye jaana jata hai, jo ise luxury items ke liye perfect banata hai.

questions.question: Yarn label par care symbols ka kya importance hai?

options.A: Ye yarn ka weight batate hain.
options.B: Ye yarn ko kaise wash, dry aur care karna hai, uski guidelines dete hain.
options.C: Ye yarn ka origin batate hain.
options.D: Ye yarn ka price batate hain.

questions.explanation: Care symbols yarn ko sahi tarike se maintain karne ke liye important instructions dete hain, jisse finished item ki longevity badhti hai.

questions.question: Agar aapko ek project mein 'too tight stitches' ki problem aa rahi hai, toh aap kya adjust karenge?

options.B: Apni tension ko loose karna ya bada hook/needle use karna

questions.explanation: Too tight stitches ko fix karne ke liye aapko apni working tension ko thoda loose karna hoga ya ek bada hook/needle size use karna hoga.

questions.question: Blended yarns ka kya fayda hai?

options.A: Ye sirf ek fiber se bante hain.
options.B: Ye multiple fibers ke best qualities ko combine karte hain.
options.D: Ye sirf winter wear ke liye hain.

questions.explanation: Blended yarns mein do ya zyada fiber types combine hote hain, jisse har fiber ki acchi qualities ko ek saath laya ja sakta hai (e.g., wool ki warmth aur acrylic ki durability).

questions.question: Agar aapka project 'curling' kar raha hai edges par, toh kya solution ho sakta hai?

options.B: Border mein Garter stitch ya Ribbing add karna, ya project ko block karna.

questions.explanation: Stockinette stitch jaise patterns mein edges curl karte hain. Isse bachne ke liye Garter stitch ya Ribbing borders add kiye jaate hain, ya fir project ko blocking se theek kiya ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Yarn ke 'dye lot' number ko check karna kyun important hai jab aap multiple skeins buy kar rahe hon?

options.A: Isse yarn ka weight pata chalta hai.
options.B: Isse ensure hota hai ki sabhi skeins ka color exact match ho, minor variations se bachne ke liye.
options.C: Isse yarn ka fiber type pata chalta hai.
options.D: Isse yarn ki manufacturing date pata chalti hai.

questions.explanation: Different dye lots mein color ke slight variations ho sakte hain. Ek hi project ke liye same dye lot ka yarn use karne se color consistency maintain rehti hai.
